name: resilience-coach
description: Synthetic-data SEL practice companion with an Apps SDK widget and safety handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Child-safe SEL practice with synthetic data
interface.longDescription: Run and evaluate a short, adult-supervised SEL practice experience for ages 6–8, with synthetic profile memory, large choice-based UI, and a demoable safety lock and adult handoff.
defaultPrompt: Start Resilience Coach with the sharing demo.
Show the synthetic profile memory working.
